text: Welcome to the team, @helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. Check out #mod-guidelines to get started.
Hi @newbie_kim, welcome to the community! You're all set as a member. Introduce yourself in #introductions when ready!
Welcome aboard, @guide_sam! You're set up as an event helper. Events are posted in #event-planning — jump in anytime!
Welcome @mentor_lina! Thanks for volunteering as a mentor. Check #mentor-resources and feel free to reach out if you need anything.
